title: persoonia manotricha
intro: Persoonia manotricha, also known as the Spiny Geebung, is a flowering plant native to Australia, belonging to the family Proteaceae. It has been used in traditional Aboriginal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is said to have health benefits such as reducing pain and inflammation, and potentially treating conditions like arthritis and skin infections. The herbal preparations of Persoonia manotricha include infusions and decoctions, which can be made by steeping the leaves and flowers in hot water.
